description: Style Note Inspired from India's rich jewel history, this pair of earrings from royal diadem is sure to become a love-forever statement piece in your jewellery box. Style this with matching ethnic suits or saris or wear it with a monochrome ensemble for an interesting fusion vibe. This piece is guaranteed to give your look an instant boho edge (if it's a Western outfit) or a refined polish (if paired with ethnic wear) Product Details Flower shaped base with pearl like and red stone embellishments Teardrop shaped dangler with pearl like embellishments on the periphery and red stone embellishments Has a red bead hanging from the dangler Has a earring post and hook closure Material and Care Gold plated metal Wipe with a cotton swab to remove dust Size Length: 9 cm
